creator: boris.hollas@gmx.de
text:
MPlayer shows only scrambled video output if I play CSS encrypted DVDs.

I installed MPlayer from ports:

MPlayer Makefile: Makefile,v 1.184 2009/03/01
Mplayer version: MPlayer 1.0rc2-4.2.1 

MPlayer is however able to play CSS encrypted DVDs on my FreeBSD system if I
- play the DVD with MPlayer on Linux
- copy ~/.dvdcss from Linux to FreeBSD

I assume that MPlayer's internal libdvdcss does not work on FreeBSD.

See also pr ports/128074.
